data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that 'Some providers work multiple locations', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions that Dr. Williams works at different locations on different days, it lacks specific evidence to demonstrate that the system supports this behavior. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to satisfy the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that providers can work at multiple locations within the system.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
